testcase.name: SC-12-STUB-T01 · adversarial · 匿名 Shell + XSS 安全 + a11y (4 cases) › ADV-12-STUB-T01 (a) shell_top_nav_renders: Logo + 登录胶囊 visible + 各自跳对路由
SC-12-STUB-T01 · adversarial · 匿名 Shell + XSS 安全 + a11y (4 cases) › ADV-12-STUB-T01 (b) no_tabbar_rendered: 匿名 stub 页严禁 Tab Bar (biz §2A.3.2)
SC-12-STUB-T01 · adversarial · 匿名 Shell + XSS 安全 + a11y (4 cases) › ADV-12-STUB-T01 (c) entry_source_xss_safe: ?entry_source=<script>...· sanitize → unknown
SC-12-STUB-T01 · adversarial · 匿名 Shell + XSS 安全 + a11y (4 cases) › ADV-12-STUB-T01 (d) cta_keyboard_accessible: Tab + Enter 也能触发 CTA → /auth/login
SC-12-STUB-T01 · P-GUEST-CAPTURE 占位 stub 主 spec (4 cases) › TC-12-STUB-T01 (a) stub_page_renders: /guest/capture · root + 文字「游客试用功能开发中」visible
SC-12-STUB-T01 · P-GUEST-CAPTURE 占位 stub 主 spec (4 cases) › TC-12-STUB-T01 (b) cta_navigates_to_auth: click CTA → /auth/login · 不带 redirect query
SC-12-STUB-T01 · P-GUEST-CAPTURE 占位 stub 主 spec (4 cases) › TC-12-STUB-T01 (c) no_backend_calls: /api/guest/* + /api/ai/* + /api/file/* 累计 0 calls
SC-12-STUB-T01 · P-GUEST-CAPTURE 占位 stub 主 spec (4 cases) › TC-12-STUB-T01 (d) deeplink_direct_works: 直接 goto (无 referer) · stub 仍 mount
